presentation.latex: Fθ = Ex,y∼Pθ (X,Y ) [∇θ log Pθ(x, y)·∇θ log Pθ(x, y)⊺] We follow the implementation details given in Vu et al. (2020). For a datasetD and a modelM ﬁne- tuned onD, we compute the empirical FIM based on D’s examples. The task embeddings are the diagonal entries of the FIM.
